'''Ivey''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] with a troubled past who worked for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and later the [[Red Moons]], as a procurement specialist. She joined the Rebellion shortly after the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]. Among her specialties were code breaking and data slicing. She was also known to be adept at unarmed combat.<ref name="AJ3" />

She met [[Andrephan Stormcaller]] when she was transferred to [[Red Alpha]]. During her service in Red Alpha, she learned how to handle energy weapons and also received training in piloting.<ref name="AJ3" />

After the destruction of the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]], she left the Rebellion and, much to [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken's]] surprise, started working for the Red Moons [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] group. She and [[Hugo Cutter]] worked together on a mission against [[Pentastar Trust and Safety Assurance Bank]]. They entered a branch of the bank and cuffed a clerk to his desk so they could get access to his terminal. Ivey deposited a million counterfeit [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and wiped the bank's inventory control program so the financial institute would have to shut down to clean up its records. She escaped with Cutter as he set off smoke bombs to cover them.<ref name="AJ3" />

Ivey was on [[Entralla/Legends|Entralla]] with the rest of the Red Moons. The group planned on disrupting the [[Lunar Night]] festivities. After saving [[Reina Gale]] and [[Rollo]] from the [[Pentastar Patrol|local authorities]], Ivey used a portable computer and [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] to give false orders to the pursuing patrols and draw them away from the group. She later confirmed that the credits that Gale was carrying had been reported as stolen and were worthless until they had been electronically cleaned of their register codes.<ref name="AJ4">{{JournalCite|4|It's a Gambler's Life}}</ref>
